A1→B1 Work / Social ~55s

Catching Up with a Coworker

100Ls Shadowing Material · Lesson 03  ·  ← 上一课
📄 Full Script — Dialogue
0:00 / 0:00
速度：
Alex
Hey, long time no see! How have you been? I feel like I haven't seen you in forever.
Jamie
I know, right? Things have been pretty crazy on my end. We just wrapped up a big project last week — I think I was in the office until nine every night.
Alex
Oh wow, that sounds exhausting. Are you finally getting some rest?
Jamie
A little bit, yeah. How about you? Anything exciting going on?
Alex
Not too much, honestly. Just the usual. Oh — but I did start going to the gym again.
Jamie
Nice! How's that going?
Alex
It's going well, actually. I'm only going like three times a week, but it makes a big difference.
Jamie
I should really do the same. I keep saying I will and then I never do.
Alex
Ha, I know the feeling. You just have to start — that's the hardest part.
Jamie
True. Anyway, we should grab lunch sometime and catch up properly.
Alex
Yeah, definitely. Let's actually make it happen this time.
Alex：嘿，好久不见！你最近怎么样？感觉好久没见到你了。
Jamie：是啊！我这边最近挺忙的。我们刚完成了一个大项目——上周我几乎每晚都待到九点。
Alex：哇，听起来很累。你终于可以休息一下了吗？
Jamie：稍微休息了一点。你呢？最近有什么新鲜事吗？
Alex：没什么特别的，老样子。哦——不过我又开始去健身房了。
Jamie：不错！进展怎么样？
Alex：其实还不错，我一周只去三次，但感觉差别很大。
Jamie：我也该这样做了。我一直说要去，但就是没行动。
Alex：哈，我懂那种感觉。你只需要开始——那才是最难的部分。
Jamie：说得对。总之，我们应该找个时间一起吃顿午饭，好好叙叙旧。
Alex：是啊，一定要。这次我们真的要说到做到。
今天听了 0 遍
🎯 Sentence Practice — 全文逐句拆解
Alex
Hey, long time no see! How have you been? I feel like I haven't seen you in forever.
嘿，好久不见！你最近怎么样？感觉好久没见到你了。
Jamie
I know, right? Things have been pretty crazy on my end. We just wrapped up a big project last week — I think I was in the office until nine every night.
是啊！我这边最近挺忙的。我们刚刚完成了一个大项目——上周我几乎每晚都待到九点。
Alex
Oh wow, that sounds exhausting. Are you finally getting some rest?
哇，听起来很累。你终于可以休息一下了吗？
Jamie
A little bit, yeah. How about you? Anything exciting going on?
稍微休息了一点。你呢？最近有什么新鲜事吗？
Alex
Not too much, honestly. Just the usual. Oh — but I did start going to the gym again.
没什么特别的，老样子。哦——不过我又开始去健身房了。
Jamie
Nice! How's that going?
不错！进展怎么样？
Alex
It's going well, actually. I'm only going like three times a week, but it makes a big difference.
其实还不错。我一周只去三次，但感觉差别很大。
Jamie
I should really do the same. I keep saying I will and then I never do.
我也该这样做了。我一直说要去，但就是没行动。
Alex
Ha, I know the feeling. You just have to start — that's the hardest part.
哈，我懂那种感觉。你只需要开始——那才是最难的部分。
Jamie
True. Anyway, we should grab lunch sometime and catch up properly.
说得对。总之，我们应该找个时间一起吃顿午饭，好好叙叙旧。
Alex
Yeah, definitely. Let's actually make it happen this time.
是啊，一定要。这次我们真的要说到做到。
📚 Key Vocabulary & Phrases
long time no see
/lɒŋ taɪm nəʊ siː/
打招呼
好久不见
📝 用法说明
非正式问候语，用于久别重逢时。源自直译中文"好久不见"，被英语吸收为固定表达。通常后面跟 How have you been? 或 How's everything?
💬 例句
Hey, long time no see! How's the family?
嘿，好久不见！家人都好吗？
— Oh wow, long time no see! Are you still working at Google?
哇，好久不见！你还在谷歌工作吗？
🔄 近义表达
It's been ages! I haven't seen you in forever! Where have you been hiding?
wrap up
/ræp ʌp/
phrasal v.
完成、收尾；结束（会议/工作/项目）
📝 用法说明
及物或不及物均可。作及物动词时，宾语可在 wrap 和 up 之间：wrap it up / wrap up a project。口语中也常用于礼貌地结束对话或会议。
🔗 常见搭配
wrap up a project wrap up a meeting wrap things up let's wrap up
💬 例句
We just wrapped up a big project last week.
我们上周刚完成了一个大项目。
Let's wrap up this meeting — it's almost 6.
我们结束会议吧，快六点了。
Can you wrap up what you're doing and come help?
你能收个尾然后来帮个忙吗？
on my/your end
/ɒn maɪ end/
短语
在我/你这边，就我/你而言
📝 用法说明
职场和日常对话中非常高频。强调"从我的角度/情况来看"，常用于区分双方各自的状况。可与各种代词搭配：on my end / on your end / on our end / on their end。
💬 例句
Things have been pretty crazy on my end.
我这边最近挺忙/乱的。
How's everything on your end?
你那边情况怎么样？
The issue is on our end — we'll fix it right away.
问题出在我们这边，我们马上修复。
make a difference
/meɪk ə ˈdɪfrəns/
短语
有影响/作用，起到效果
📝 用法说明
用 a difference（不定冠词）表示"产生影响"；用 the difference 表示"起到决定性作用"。注意 difference 不能省略：❌ it makes 不完整。常用副词修饰：big/huge/real/little difference。
🔗 常见搭配
make a big difference make a real difference make all the difference make no difference
💬 例句
Going three times a week makes a big difference.
每周去三次差别很大。
Getting enough sleep makes all the difference.
睡够觉真的能改变一切。
It doesn't make a difference to me either way.
对我来说都无所谓。
catch up (with sb)
/kætʃ ʌp/
phrasal v.
叙旧，聊近况；追上（进度/某人）
📝 用法说明
社交场合表示"叙旧、分享近况"。注意与表示"追上"的用法区分：catch up on sleep（补觉）/ catch up on work（补进度）/ let's catch up（叙旧）。口语中也常用名词 a catch-up："We need a proper catch-up."
🔗 常见搭配
catch up with friends catch up over lunch catch up on sleep have a catch-up
💬 例句
We should grab lunch and catch up properly.
我们应该找时间吃顿饭好好叙旧。
I need to catch up on sleep this weekend.
这个周末我得好好补觉。
Let's have a quick catch-up before the meeting.
会议前我们快速同步一下。
make it happen
/meɪk ɪt ˈhæpən/
短语
付诸行动，说到做到，让它成真
📝 用法说明
强调"把计划真正实现"，带有一种主动承诺的语气。常接在之前已提过某事之后，表示"这次要真正行动"。同类搭配还有：make it work（让它运转起来）/ make it count（让它有意义）。
🔄 近义表达
follow through get it done actually do it this time
💬 例句
Let's actually make it happen this time.
这次我们真的要说到做到。
I know it's hard, but we can make it happen.
我知道很难，但我们能做到。
🔗 Connected Speech
How have you been?
/haʊ həv jʊ biːn/
弱读 Reduction
have 弱读为 /həv/，整句连成一气。与 "How are you?" 区别：How have you been? 问的是这段时间的整体状态（隐含久别重逢），更深切。 快速发音：haʊ-həv-jʊ-biːn（四个音节连在一起）
just wrapped up
/dʒʌs ræpt ʌp/
连读 Linking + 失爆 Elision
just 末尾 /t/ 遇到 wrapped 的 /r/ 时发生失爆，/t/ 几乎不发出，听起来像 "jus-rapped-up"。 练习：just arrived / just about / just in case — 都有类似的 /t/ 失爆现象。
going to the gym
/ˈɡəʊɪŋ tə ðə dʒɪm/
弱读 Reduction
to the 弱读为 /tə ðə/，是英语口语中最高频的弱读组合。听力中极容易漏听。 "to the" 在快速口语中几乎变成一个短促的 "tuh-thuh"，重音完全落在后面的实义词上。
make it happen
/ˈmeɪk ɪt ˈhæpən/
连读 Linking
make it 中 /k/ 与 /ɪt/ 紧密连读，/k/ 变成弹舌音或轻声，听起来像 "may-kit"。 同类连读：take it / break it / fake it — 所有 "-ake it" 组合都有类似现象。
